title: Kanzashi
description: Allows putting flowers in ones hair
body:
it's always baffled me that minecraft has all these beautiful flowers yet never made them equippable. so this mod does that. put flowers in your hair. go on. i dare you. you wont

anything the game considers plants can now be equipped in the head slot (or used out of the inventory to equip) so all flowers, mushrooms and saplings are supported. modded flowers should also be supported by default

[video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aqrNH1aQyHk)
